name: Chocolate Butter Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop each square of bittersweet chocolate into 16 pieces.
2. Place 4 chunks of chopped chocolate into the bottom of each tart shell.
3. Whisk together brown sugar, corn syrup, egg, softened butter, vanilla extract, vinegar, and a pinch of salt until well combined.
4. Spoon the mixture into the tart shells, filling them about three-quarters full.
5. Bake at 450°F (232°C) for 12-14 minutes, or until the filling is puffed and bubbly, and the pastry is lightly golden.
6. Allow to cool on wire racks.
7. Drizzle with melted bittersweet chocolate.
